'''Teardrop''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]]. It contained [[Por'ste Island]] and was near [[Briston]].

The world played host to a covert [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Listening post/Legends|listening post]] that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attempted to raid in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. The Rebels, however, managed to escape before the raid; in response, the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] ordered the [[Teardrop massacre|massacre]] of a [[City on the hills|town]] on that world, seeking to blame them for harboring agents of the Alliance.

In an ironic twist of fate, the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that had been ordered to subjugate the planet, the [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']], inadvertently aided the last ship to evacuate the planet's contingent of Alliance forces, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], which was under attack by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] as the ship made its escape. In response to a distress call given by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] using the ''Falcon''{{'s}} current false transponder ID ''Argos'', the ''Reprisal'' fired on and destroyed several pursuing pirate fighter craft.
